'''Wesselman''' was the employer of [[Pinchers]] who worked out of [[Amorris]] and was one of the primary subordinates of the [[Cavrilhu Pirates]]. He was in charge of the delivery of shipments to the [[Kauron system/Legends|Kauron system]] base. He was arrested by a [[New Republic Intelligence Service|New Republic Intelligence]] agent and was supposedly in the custody of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] on Amorris when [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] tried to to infiltrate the Cavrilhu Pirate base in the Kauron System. Additionally, he owned an [[SB-20 Slicer Droid]].
